known_gaps.G1: McClellan ±100 thrust threshold calibrated for US ~3000 issues; TW ~1000 issues may need V2.5 backtest calibration
known_gaps.G2: TAIEX stock_id in FinMind: probe 'TAIEX' first, fallback '0001'; if both fail, divergence_dot=null path (SC-5)
known_gaps.KG3: First-fetch cost ~257s (per-trading-day loop, 100+ FinMind calls at sponsor 5-15/s). 24h cache TTL amortizes to ~11s on subsequent /api/market/snapshot calls. V2.5 mitigation options: warmer cron job, shrink default lookback, or find dataset that honours date range without data_id.

context_note: Phase 2 of market-monitor-v2 spec (spec.md §6.3 + plan.md Phase 2). P1 universe filter merged in PR #10, reuse via injection (no refactor).
